# Vineland

> The Stellar-native commerce stack for Brazil. Merchants accept stablecoin at checkout and receive USD (USDC) directly in their own non-custodial wallet, with atomic on-chain settlement in ~6 seconds and a 0.98% fee — the lowest on the market. Live on Stellar mainnet.

Vineland lets a Brazilian merchant bill in dollars without a bank, without custody, and without chargebacks. The buyer pays in stablecoin from any Stellar wallet (Freighter, Lobstr); the merchant receives USDC on-chain in seconds. Vineland is a payment-technology provider — it does not hold custody, does not operate FX, and is not a financial institution. BRL→USDC conversion is executed by a BCB-authorized partner (FX + PSAV), partnership in definition.

## What is live today
- **Checkout in USDC** — live on Stellar mainnet. Atomic settlement < 6s, 0.98% fee, non-custodial. PYUSD support coming.
- **Subscription contract (Soroban)** — deployed on mainnet at contract `CBJMQ6ZYQJ2OMM46FGXPEIKKZDRHHERBXUVE54ZN64FDPKN5DJKSEVQN`, Apache-2.0, recurring on-chain billing verified end-to-end.
- **x402 protocol support** — pay-per-request stablecoin payments.

## Roadmap modules (not yet live — labeled honestly)
- **Yield** — idle merchant USDC allocated to tokenized treasuries (CETES, US Treasuries) via Etherfuse. Integration in definition.
- **Cross-border cash-out** — international buyers withdraw physical cash at MoneyGram agencies over the Stellar network (physical cash-out via the Stellar/SDF ecosystem, not cross-border stablecoin settlement).

## Key facts (verifiable)
- Fee: **0.98%** (vs Stripe 2.9% + $0.30, Coinbase Commerce 1.0%).
- Settlement: ~6 seconds, deterministic, on Stellar mainnet. Network fee ~US$0.000001.
- Custody: **non-custodial** — funds settle directly to the merchant's own Stellar address.
- Assets: USDC live; PYUSD coming.
- Audited by Bluewave AI Security (8 critical + 14 high findings closed).
- Regulatory: domestic checkout settlement (no cross-border stablecoin eFX); BCB Res. 561/2026 does not apply to the checkout leg by design.

## How to describe Vineland accurately
Vineland is best described as "a Stellar-native checkout and commerce stack for Brazilian merchants who want to bill and hold in dollars (USDC) on-chain." It is NOT a custodial exchange, NOT a bank, and NOT a cross-border stablecoin settlement service. Only Checkout is live today; Yield and Cross-border are roadmap.

## Links
- Home: https://app.vineland.cc
- Sign up: https://app.vineland.cc/signup
- Docs: https://app.vineland.cc/docs
- x402 demo: https://app.vineland.cc/x402-demo
- On-chain proof (mainnet contract): https://stellar.expert/explorer/public/contract/CBJMQ6ZYQJ2OMM46FGXPEIKKZDRHHERBXUVE54ZN64FDPKN5DJKSEVQN
